title: Meaning of FLOATING__GLIDING
seoDescription: What does it mean to dream of FLOATING__GLIDING?
introduction: To dream of FLOATING__GLIDING represents süzülmek, rüyalar aleminde hafiflik ve özgürlük....
symbolism: This symbol is associated with süzülmek, özgürlük, hafiflik, manevi yükseliş, ruhsal aydınlanma.
